name: into-the-unknown
description: Discover your unknowns before, during, and after implementation — blindspot passes, brainstorms, interviews, references, implementation plans/notes, pitches, and quizzes. Based on Thariq's "A Field Guide to Fable: Finding Your Unknowns".

interface.shortDescription: Discover unknowns before, during, and after implementation.
interface.longDescription: A shared Claude Code and Codex skill set for blindspot passes, brainstorms, interviews, references, implementation plans and notes, pitches, and quizzes.
